opinion.h4: REEVES v. ALABAMA. CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF ALABAMA. No. 66. Argued January 8-9, 1958. Decided January 13, 1958.
opinion.p: Peter A. Hall and Orzell Billingsley, Jr. argued the cause and filed a brief for petitioner.
William F. Thetford and Robert B. Stewart argued the cause for respondent. With them on the brief were John Patterson, Attorney General of Alabama, and Bernard F. Sykes, Assistant Attorney General.
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
